workouts.name: Hybrid Home Dynamic 12
workouts.title: Hybrid Home Dynamic 12 — 60s Work / 45s Rest
workouts.subtitle: Random 12 stations • 2 laps • 2:00 break between laps • Balanced across movement categories.
workouts.equipmentNote: Equipment pool: 2×5kg DB, 2×10kg DB, pull-up bar, light band, heavy band, bodyweight.

exercises.name: Pull-Ups / Chin-Ups
exercises.desc: Full hang; ribs down; controlled reps

exercises.name: Negative Pull-Ups
exercises.desc: Step/jump to top; 3–5s lowering

exercises.name: Banded Assisted Pull-Ups
exercises.desc: Band on bar; knee/foot in band; full ROM

exercises.name: DB Bent-Over Row
exercises.desc: Flat back; pull to pockets; pause 1s

exercises.name: DB Underhand Row
exercises.desc: Supinated grip; elbows close; squeeze lats

exercises.name: Single-Arm DB Row
exercises.desc: Brace hard; elbow to hip; slow return

exercises.name: DB Renegade Row (knees if needed)
exercises.desc: Hips square; slow pull; no twisting

exercises.name: Band Row
exercises.desc: Squeeze shoulder blades; control return

exercises.name: Band Lat Pulldown (anchor high)
exercises.desc: Drive elbows down; pause at bottom

exercises.name: Band Face Pull
exercises.desc: Pull to eyebrows; elbows high; 1s squeeze

exercises.name: Band Pull-Aparts
exercises.desc: Straight arms; squeeze mid-back

exercises.name: DB Rear Delt Fly
exercises.desc: Soft elbows; move from shoulder; no swing

exercises.name: DB Hammer Curl
exercises.desc: Neutral grip; elbows pinned; slow eccentric

exercises.name: DB Supinated Curl
exercises.desc: Full supination; avoid swinging

exercises.name: DB Concentration Curl
exercises.desc: Elbow on thigh; squeeze top; slow down

exercises.name: Band Curl
exercises.desc: Constant tension; full ROM; controlled

exercises.name: DB Strict Press
exercises.desc: Ribs down; glutes tight; smooth press

exercises.name: DB Push Press
exercises.desc: Dip-drive; punch to lockout; no over-arch

exercises.name: DB Arnold Press
exercises.desc: Rotate smoothly; avoid shrugging

exercises.name: DB Floor Press
exercises.desc: Elbows ~45°; pause on floor; press fast

exercises.name: DB Squeeze Press (floor)
exercises.desc: Press DBs together; slow down

exercises.name: Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Full-body tension; chest to floor; lock out

exercises.name: Close-Grip Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Elbows close; triceps bias; quality reps

exercises.name: Pike Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Hips high; head between hands; control

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.desc: Raise to mid-chest; slow lower; no swing

exercises.name: DB Front Raise
exercises.desc: Stop at shoulder height; control down

exercises.name: Band Triceps Pushdown
exercises.desc: Lock elbows; full extension; slow return

exercises.name: Band Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.desc: Long-head stretch; elbows narrow

exercises.name: DB Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.desc: Slow eccentric; elbows in

exercises.name: DB Triceps Kickback
exercises.desc: Hinge; elbows high; squeeze hard

exercises.name: DB Goblet Squat
exercises.desc: Elbows inside knees; full-foot pressure

exercises.name: DB Front Squat
exercises.desc: DBs at shoulders; torso tall; brace

exercises.name: DB Thruster
exercises.desc: Squat → drive overhead; steady breathing

exercises.name: DB Reverse Lunge
exercises.desc: 10 total = 5/leg; step back softly

exercises.name: DB Split Squat
exercises.desc: Control depth; knee tracks toes; upright torso

exercises.name: DB Lateral Lunge
exercises.desc: Sit back into hip; push floor away

exercises.name: DB Step-Up (chair/box)
exercises.desc: Drive through full foot; control down

exercises.name: Band Squat (band under feet)
exercises.desc: Knees out; constant tension; full depth

exercises.name: Band Lateral Walk
exercises.desc: Short steps; hips level; knees out

exercises.name: Tempo Air Squat
exercises.desc: 3s down; 1s pause; stand tall

exercises.name: Squat Pulses
exercises.desc: Stay mid-range; constant tension

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.desc: Hips back; lats on; feel hamstrings

exercises.name: DB Suitcase Deadlift
exercises.desc: Brace; stand tall; avoid rounding

exercises.name: DB Staggered-Stance RDL
exercises.desc: 70/30 stance; hinge; slow down

exercises.name: DB Single-Leg RDL
exercises.desc: Square hips; reach long; control

exercises.name: Band Good Morning
exercises.desc: Band at hips; hinge; squeeze glutes

exercises.name: Band Pull-Through (anchor low)
exercises.desc: Hinge back; snap hips through

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.desc: Ribs down; full hip extension; pause

exercises.name: DB Glute Bridge
exercises.desc: Pause at top; knees steady

exercises.name: DB Hang Clean (two DB)
exercises.desc: Jump-shrug; fast elbows; soft catch

exercises.name: Single-Arm DB Snatch
exercises.desc: Hip drive; DB close; punch overhead

exercises.name: DB Hip Hinge Swing (DB between legs)
exercises.desc: Hinge not squat; snap hips; float DB

exercises.name: Band Pallof Press
exercises.desc: Anti-rotation press straight out and back in

exercises.name: Band Wood Chop
exercises.desc: Diagonal pull with controlled trunk rotation

exercises.name: Russian Twist
exercises.desc: Rotate ribcage over stable hips; smooth cadence

exercises.name: DB Halo
exercises.desc: Circle around head while keeping torso steady

exercises.name: Dead Bug Cross Reach
exercises.desc: Cross-body core control; lower back pinned

exercises.name: DB Reverse Lunge
exercises.desc: Step back; front knee tracks toes; drive up strong

exercises.name: DB Forward Lunge
exercises.desc: Controlled descent and stable front knee

exercises.name: Bodyweight Alternating Lunge
exercises.desc: Switch legs each rep; keep torso upright

exercises.name: DB Split Squat (R)
exercises.desc: Stay tall and drive through front foot

exercises.name: DB Split Squat (L)
exercises.desc: Match right-side depth and rhythm

exercises.name: Farmer Carry March
exercises.desc: March in place with loaded grip and braced core

exercises.name: Suitcase Carry March
exercises.desc: One-sided load; resist side bend and switch halfway

exercises.name: Front Rack Carry March
exercises.desc: Dumbbells racked at shoulders; controlled breathing

exercises.name: Overhead Carry March
exercises.desc: Arm locked overhead; ribs down; switch sides

exercises.name: Heavy Band Resisted Walkout Hold
exercises.desc: Step out against band tension and hold posture
